name: TSUCHI YADORI NO JUTSU (EARTH HAVEN TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, E, H, Mas

You must be in direct contact with the earth of rock you intend to use, which will rise up into a sturdy and simple hut that is 20 ft long, 20 ft wide, and 10 ft high. It has no windows and a single entrance, sized to fit a Medium-sized creature easily. The opening in will appear in whatever wall of the structure you desire.

The shelter looks like an ordinary stone building of its size (not counting the obvious lack of windows), and counts as though it were made of stone regardless of the material actually used. As such, it resists fire and is immune to normal projectiles (except siege weaponry), and will retain heat well enough to provide a comfortable shelter even in colder environments if a simple fire is lit within.

The shelter contains no furniture or other features, and lasts until dispelled or its duration expires, after which it will crumble to nothingness.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the duration by 1 day (up to 10 extra days).

Mastery: The first step allows you to increases the shelter size to 30ft by 30 ft.

The third step adds basic furniture to the shelter, such as tables, chairs and a fireplace you can cook in.

The fifth step allows you to increases the shelter size to 40ft by 40 ft.
